factors.summary: The company is shifting its revenue mix towards higher-margin segments, particularly software and services, driven by the adoption of AI-based technologies. This shift is evident in the significant increase in net sales for the Software and Services segment, which rose by 38.7% year-over-year, primarily due to a higher number of users and increased adoption of premium features.

evidence.text: The company is shifting its revenue mix towards higher-margin segments, particularly software and services.
evidence.subsection: Uncertainty in the development, deployment, and use of AI in our products and services, as well as our business more broadly, could adversely affect our business and reputation.

evidence.text: Net sales for the Software and Services segment increased 38.7% for the three months ended March 31, 2025 as compared to the prior-year quarter. The increase in the aggregate number of users and growing adoption of our premium add-on features by existing customers drove the majority of the increase of $73.3 million.
evidence.subsection: Net Sales
